creator: rokernel@yahoo.com
text:
Hello,
I have 2 servers with amd64 4400+ procesor with diferent mainboards..
everything works fine until i connect remotely to ssh then after a few
commands the system crash i can`t fine anything in the logs.

A paste of dmesg is show down.

How-To-Repeat: To repeat the problem you must install freebsd with minimal configuration from cd/dvd or from www/ftp. After that i have pkg_add -r cvsup-without-gui
rehash
	cd /usr/share/examples/cvsup
	cp ports-supfile /usr/local/etc
	cp standard-supfile /usr/local/etc
	cd /usr/local/etc
ee ports-supfile
	ee standard-supfile
	cd
	cvsup -g -L 2 /usr/local/etc/ports-supfile ; cvsup -g -L 2 /usr/local/etc/standard-supfile
like the page: http://test.davidpierron.com/fbsd-pf.php
And in ports-supfile i have put www1.ro.freebsd.org
After all instructions the new kernel is FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE-p8
Now if i ssh to the server after some commands like "ls, ps ax" the server
crash and it needs reboot if i don`t make ssh to the server and make ssh
from the lan everything works fine it only crash when i make ssh to the
external network card with a real ip.
